channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 18 Leighton Place, 5th April
item.description:
Please fix the loose concrete and paving slab in the centre of this image as it is a trip hazard. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Leighton Place, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 5th April
item.description:
Graffiti on grey utility box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laughing Gas Canisters, 5th April
item.description:
Three canisters were dumped in the kerb at the bottom of Whitfield Road (the Lenham Road end). The other 3 in the box were dumped at the other end of Whitfield Road (which joins into Ashbourne Avenue).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitfield Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox bagged on side of the road, 5th April
item.description:
Dead fox in garden fox project bagged up advised to leave for council to collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping here again., 5th April
item.description:

item.title: This needs some gardening to happen, 5th April
item.description:
What’s the point in spending tons of money to put in these things if they just get left to get overgrown, full of weeds and littered with rubbish????

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): White Hart Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
